title: 螃蟹的路灯 Crab Street Light
description: The mod adds a large number of street lights, which can be freely matched
body:
This is a modern urban street light mod, the mod adds many street light poles, street light heads, street light branches, players can freely match street lights according to their needs. The mod model maker and mod developer is a Chinese student, and the mod development and production software is MCreator
﻿
